extraction_notes: Source material focuses on technical development aspects (version info, debug text, anti-piracy methods) rather than gameplay design documentation. Level design sequencing, rhythm patterns, and spatial grammar could not be definitively extracted from available documentation. Data represents inferred patterns from game series context and platform conventions rather than explicit design documentation.
